---
title: "about_page_3"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

The **_GAM-MAP_** incorporates data from the various sources:
1. **Malaria Data - [National Malaria Elimination Program (NMEP)](https://ghs.gov.gh/)**, Ghana Health Service. <span style="color:green;">**_Available upon request_**</span>.  
2. **Climate Data - [Ghana Meteorological Agency (GMeT)](https://www.meteo.gov.gh/)**. <span style="color:green;">**_Available upon request_**</span>.  
3. **Spatial Data - [Database of Global Administrative Areas (GADM)](https://gadm.org/download_country.html)**, used for Ghana's former ten regional boundary shapefiles. <span style="color:green;">**_Publicly available_**</span>.
